name: Does my city matter for voice search, or is it the same everywhere?
description: Your city matters a lot because voice searches are highly local. Use natural city and neighborhood language so assistants can match you to nearby intent.

mainEntity.name: Does my city matter for voice search, or is it the same everywhere?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, local phrasing matters because voice searches are often conversational and location-specific. For a business in Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, or Salt Lake City, that means using natural city and neighborhood language on your site and listings without stuffing keywords.
acceptedAnswer.description: Your city matters a lot because voice searches are highly local. Use natural city and neighborhood language so assistants can match you to nearby intent.
